concepts.finding:
We introduce a concept of the adaptive look-alike model, which incorporate iterative exploratory approach to
look-alike modelling.
concepts.implication: General ML methodology applicable to content recommendation

concepts.finding:
Existing Look-alike Models
The most widely spread approach to the problem is to solve an isolated problem of searching an expanded audience
that consist of similar users.
concepts.implication: Relevant for similarity-based retrieval and lookalike targeting

concepts.finding:
The model has achieved the improved performance in comparison to the baseline method by 12.5% in AUC using
a Thompson Sampling model.
concepts.implication: General ML methodology applicable to content recommendation

This improvement encourages us to continue studying applications for reinforcement

concepts.finding:
Instead of solving the sorting
or expanding task, we can solve the following task: predict, if it is proﬁtable to show the ad for a speciﬁc user to reach
the advertising campaign global goal, i.e cost per conversion.
concepts.implication: Directly applicable to CTR/CVR prediction in advertising systems
